      "source": [
        "#IMPORTING ALL THE LIBRARIES NEEDED:\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",

        "import seaborn as sns\n",

        "from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression, Ridge, Lasso\n",
        "from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor\n",
        "from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error, r2_score"
      ]
    },

      "source": [
        "**Data Preprocessing**"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "qYYBK3FW_we3"
      }

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#changing , value into string\n",
        "cols_to_fix = ['Open', 'High', 'Low', 'Close', 'Change', 'Volume']\n",
        "for col in cols_to_fix:\n",
        "    df[col] = df[col].astype(str).str.replace(',', '').str.replace(' ', '')\n",
        "    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors='coerce')\n",
        "df.head()"
      ],

        "# Graph of correlation_heatmap\n",
        "df['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date'])\n",

        "plt.title('Feature Correlation Matrix')\n",
        "plt.savefig('correlation_heatmap.png')"
      ],

      "cell_type": "code",

        "# Graph of scatter  plot\n",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Plot Histogram for Volume\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))\n",
        "sns.histplot(df['Volume'].dropna(), bins=50, kde=True, color='green')\n",
        "plt.title('Distribution of Trading Volume')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Volume')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Frequency')\n",
        "plt.savefig('volume_histogram.png')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {

        },

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "Creating new feature Daily_Return, Price_Range."
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "vh81DtoPIqWL"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "df['Daily_Return'] = (df['Close'] - df['Open']) / df['Open']\n",
        "df['Price_Range'] = df['High'] - df['Low']\n",
        "df.head()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.figure(figsize=(6,4))\n",
        "sns.scatterplot(x=df['Daily_Return'], y=df['Price_Range'])\n",
        "plt.title(\"Daily Return vs Price Range\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Daily Return (%)\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Price Range (High - Low)\")\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {

    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "TRAIN , TEST , SPLIT & NORMALIZATION"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Pw94ZW5pLLxY"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "features=['Date','Open','High','Low','Change','Volume']\n",
        "x=df[features]\n",
        "y=df['Close']"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "bQXCdYQlKmt0"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "X_train,X_test,Y_train,Y_test=train_test_split(x,y,test_size=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Drop the 'Date' column before scaling\n",
        "X_train_numeric = X_train.drop('Date', axis=1)\n",
        "X_test_numeric = X_test.drop('Date', axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "#Normalize features using StandardScaler\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_train_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X_train_numeric)\n",
        "X_test_scaled  = scaler.transform(X_test_numeric)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f'Training set size: {X_train.shape[0]} rows')\n",
        "print(f'Testing set size:  {X_test.shape[0]} rows')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "gz25GzE1Kmww",
        "outputId": "f4e3ffdf-42bc-405d-f643-97d68680e86f"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Training set size: 2576 rows\n",
            "Testing set size:  645 rows\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "MODEL BUILDING"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "UFJaLCLMLWQY"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#model 1:linear regression\n",
        "#We used linear regression because it is appropriate for regression tasks, which involves predicting continuous values like stock prices.\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\n",
        "lr=LinearRegression() # Initialized LinearRegression model\n",
        "lr.fit(X_train_scaled, Y_train)\n",
        "lr_pred = lr.predict(X_test_scaled)\n",
        "print('Model 1: Linear Regression — DONE')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "4s21RLFSKmzX",
        "outputId": "4c735fe4-52ba-4cbe-83cd-e0baeb409caf"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Model 1: Linear Regression — DONE\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#model 2: decision tree\n",
        "dt = DecisionTreeRegressor(random_state=42)\n",
        "dt.fit(X_train_scaled, Y_train)\n",
        "dt_pred = dt.predict(X_test_scaled)\n",
        "print('Model 2: Decision Tree — DONE')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "8HeRZsfoKm1-",
        "outputId": "b143e62e-4cf3-4a6c-f2d7-0ee3211ee7c9"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Model 2: Decision Tree — DONE\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "#model 3: random forest\n",
        "rf = RandomForestRegressor(n_estimators=100, random_state=42)\n",
        "rf.fit(X_train_scaled, Y_train)\n",
        "rf_pred = rf.predict(X_test_scaled)\n",
        "print('Model 3: Random Forest — DONE')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "GA_-lQbuLpi1",
        "outputId": "39c84243-29b1-4932-aaac-5001b4608404"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Model 3: Random Forest — DONE\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "MODEL EVALUATION AND COMPARISION"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "rYwhrdvZLua7"
      }
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Import evaluation metrics to measure model performance\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import mean_absolute_error, mean_squared_error, r2_score\n",
        "# Import numpy (used for numerical operations, though not directly used here)\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "\n",
        "# Linear Regression\n",
        "# Calculate Mean Absolute Error (average difference between actual and predicted values)\n",
        "lr_mae = mean_absolute_error(Y_test, lr_pred)\n",
        "# Calculate Mean Squared Error (penalizes larger errors more strongly)\n",
        "lr_mse = mean_squared_error(Y_test, lr_pred)\n",
        "# Calculate R2 Score (how well the model explains the data, closer to 1 is better)\n",
        "lr_r2 = r2_score(Y_test, lr_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Decision Tree\n",
        "# Same evaluation metrics applied to Decision Tree predictions\n",
        "dt_mae = mean_absolute_error(Y_test, dt_pred)\n",
        "dt_mse = mean_squared_error(Y_test, dt_pred)\n",
        "dt_r2 = r2_score(Y_test, dt_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Random Forest\n",
        "# Same evaluation metrics applied to Random Forest predictions\n",
        "rf_mae = mean_absolute_error(Y_test, rf_pred)\n",
        "rf_mse = mean_squared_error(Y_test, rf_pred)\n",
        "rf_r2 = r2_score(Y_test, rf_pred)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Comparison Table\n",
        "# Print a formatted table to compare all models easily\n",
        "print(\"=\"*55)\n",
        "# Table header\n",
        "print(f\"{'Model':<20} {'MAE':>8} {'MSE':>12} {'R2':>8}\")\n",
        "print(\"=\"*55)\n",
        "# Print results for each model with formatting\n",
        "print(f\"{'Linear Regression':<20} {lr_mae:>8.2f} {lr_mse:>12.2f} {lr_r2:>8.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"{'Decision Tree':<20} {dt_mae:>8.2f} {dt_mse:>12.2f} {dt_r2:>8.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"{'Random Forest':<20} {rf_mae:>8.2f} {rf_mse:>12.2f} {rf_r2:>8.4f}\")\n",
        "print(\"=\"*55)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "_o9drY6PLpln",
        "outputId": "b3456a05-101c-4cc0-e61d-3f35c5cc18e4"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "=======================================================\n",
            "Model                     MAE          MSE       R2\n",
            "=======================================================\n",
            "Linear Regression       46.62     14146.73   0.9998\n",
            "Decision Tree           75.88     25967.13   0.9997\n",
            "Random Forest           59.04     19159.19   0.9998\n",
            "=======================================================\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Comparing all models and selecting the best one\n",
        "models = {'Linear Regression': lr_r2,\n",
        "          'Decision Tree': dt_r2,\n",
        "          'Random Forest': rf_r2}\n",
        "best = max(models, key=models.get)\n",
        "print(f\"Best Model: {best}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "V_2eNQdrLpoi",
        "outputId": "42413fb7-d6b5-42fa-e804-b7f7e92731c9"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Best Model: Linear Regression\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "source": [
        "CONCLUSION"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "e8OBig6HL4nH"
      }

        "MODEL DEPLOYMENT (INTERFACE)"

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "# ============================================\n",
        "# DEPLOYMENT INTERFACE\n",
        "# ============================================\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"===== KSE-100 Close Price Predictor =====\")\n",
        "print(\"CHOOSE THE MODEL:\")\n",
        "print(\"1 - Linear Regression\")\n",
        "print(\"2 - Decision Tree\")\n",
        "print(\"3 - Random Forest\")\n",
        "\n",
        "choice = input(\"Choice (1/2/3): \")\n",
        "\n",
        "open_val   = float(input(\"Open price  : \"))\n",
        "high_val   = float(input(\"High price  : \"))\n",
        "low_val    = float(input(\"Low price   : \"))\n",
        "change_val = float(input(\"Change      : \"))\n",
        "vol_val    = float(input(\"Volume      : \"))\n",
        "\n",
        "# CREATING INPUT DATAFRAME\n",
        "input_df = pd.DataFrame([[open_val, high_val, low_val, change_val, vol_val]],\n",
        "                         columns=['Open','High','Low','Change','Volume'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Scaling\n",
        "input_scaled = scaler.transform(input_df)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Predicting\n",
        "if choice == '1':\n",
        "    pred = lr.predict(input_scaled)[0]\n",
        "    name = 'Linear Regression'\n",
        "elif choice == '2':\n",
        "    pred = dt.predict(input_scaled)[0]\n",
        "    name = 'Decision Tree'\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    pred = rf.predict(input_scaled)[0]\n",
        "    name = 'Random Forest'\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"==========================================\")\n",
        "print(f\"Model     : {name}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Predicted Close Price: {pred:,.2f}\")\n",
        "print(\"==========================================\")"
